name: DIY organic Homunculus

phase_0.boundary_condition: The hermetic seal of the bioreactor vessel, which transitions into the entity's own semi-permeable membrane and skin.

VINIT.justification: The void/uninitialized pluripotent mass before any pattern, differentiation, or structural memory is imposed.

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary that contains the whole system, transitioning from the external hermetic vessel to the entity's own physical skin.

AFWD.justification: Directed transformation toward a target; applying chemical signals to drive forward differentiation and spatial patterning.

AREV.justification: Reverse/descent transformation; sculpting the physical form by programmed cell death and tissue resorption.

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of vascular, neural, and muscular networks into a single functional, coordinated whole.

IMSCRIB.justification: Identity and self-reference; the entity recognizing, modeling, and maintaining its own internal state and boundaries.

FSPLIT.justification: The holistic organismal field branches into distinct neural and somatic tissue domains.

FFUSE.justification: The neural and somatic branches reconstitute the original organismal field via vascular and synaptic interconnection.

EVALT.justification: Affirmative/success state; the neural domain achieves self-modeling, sensory integration, and reactive autonomy.

EVALF.justification: Negative/failure state; ischemic failure, unstructured teratoma, or tissue death due to failed integration.

ENGAGR.justification: A paradice: holding both chaotic, unbounded cellular growth and localized, highly ordered self-modeling simultaneously without resolution.

IFIX.justification: Permanent, append-only ROM fixation; DNA methylation and histone modification lock the phenotype against developmental reversion.

phase_3.void_description: 00 - Uninoculated culture medium, sterile and devoid of patterned life, structural memory, or self-modeling capacity.
phase_3.true_description: 01 - Viable, self-modeling tissue with autonomous reflex, homeostasis, and integrated sensory-motor loops.
phase_3.false_description: 10 - Necrotic collapse, ischemic failure, or unstructured, non-viable teratoma lacking systemic coherence.
phase_3.both_description: 11 - Lucid teratoma: a paradice of chaotic, unbounded cellular growth and localized, highly ordered self-modeling held in simultaneous tension.

steps.domain_action: stem_cell_inoculum — Genesis of the uninitialized pluripotent mass, the prima materia of the homunculus.
morphogen_gradient — Application of directed chemical signals to drive forward differentiation and spatial patterning.
lineage_speciation — The organismal field branches into distinct neural and somatic tissue domains.
neurogenesis — Forward morphism on the T-arm; proliferation and migration of neural progenitor cells.
autonomous_reflex — Affirmative evaluation; the neural domain achieves self-modeling and reactive autonomy.
apoptosis_pruning — Reverse morphism on the F-arm; sculpting the form by programmed cell death and resorption.
necrotic_collapse — Negative evaluation; ischemic failure or unstructured teratoma if pruning fails.
systemic_anastomosis — Reconstitution of the organismal field; neural and somatic domains fuse via vascular and synaptic interconnection.
tissue_integration — Sequential chaining of the vascular, neural, and muscular networks into a functional whole.
lucid_teratoma — Entering the B-state paradice; holding the tension between chaotic growth potential and ordered self-modeling.
homeostatic_loop — Identity realization; the entity recognizes, models, and maintains its own internal boundary.
epigenetic_lock — Permanent ROM fixation; DNA methylation and histone modification lock the phenotype against reversion.
bioreactor_membrane — Terminal anchor; the hermetic seal of the vessel is internalized as the entity's own semi-permeable skin, closing the system.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: morphogen_gradient — Translates genetic intentions and spatial coordinates into cellular differentiation operations.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: gap_junctions_and_synapses — Electrochemical and paracrine signaling between cells for real-time state coordination.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: epigenetic_methylation — Chromatin state, histone modification, and non-coding RNA storing developmental history.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: circadian_and_metabolic_oscillators — Biological clocks determining the timing of cell division, differentiation, and apoptosis.
phase_5.alfs_store: pluripotent_genome — The canonical reference store containing the complete blueprint of all possible cell states and lineages.

phase_6.cycle_cost: atp_and_morphogen_depletion — Consumption of metabolic energy and signaling molecules per differentiation cycle.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: sterile_culture_medium — Unpatterned, thermodynamic equilibrium state prior to inoculation.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: viable_homunculus_tissue — Highly ordered, self-modeling O_inf tier biological entity.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The system is open but structurally conservative; entropy exported as heat and metabolic waste exactly balances the internal negentropy of self-organization, maintaining homeostatic equilibrium.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → AREV → EVALF → FFUSE → CLINK → ENGAGR → IMSCRIB → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: DIY organic Homunculus
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 7)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑾  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑼 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑳  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑱 → 𐑠  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [10] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑳 → 𐑭  | identity — self-imscription
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑠 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def diy_organic_homunculus_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (stem_cell_inoculum — Genesis of the uninitialized pluripotent mass, the prima...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (morphogen_gradient — Application of directed chemical signals to drive forwar...)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (lineage_speciation — The organismal field branches into distinct neural and somatic tissue domains.) / FFUSE [7] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (neurogenesis — Forward morphism on the T-arm; proliferation and migration of ...)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (autonomous_reflex — Affirmative evaluation; the neural domain achieves self-m...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (apoptosis_pruning — Reverse morphism on the F-arm; sculpting the form by prog...)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (necrotic_collapse — Negative evaluation; ischemic failure or unstructured ter...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [7]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [7] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (systemic_anastomosis — Reconstitution of the organismal field; neural and somatic domains fuse via vascular and synaptic interconnection.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (tissue_integration — Sequential chaining of the vascular, neural, and muscula...)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑱 𐑠)  -- [9] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (lucid_teratoma — Entering the B-state paradice; holding the tension between c...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑳 𐑭)  -- [10] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (homeostatic_loop — Identity realization; the entity recognizes, models, and m...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (epigenetic_lock — Permanent ROM fixation; DNA methylation and histone modific...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (bioreactor_membrane — Terminal anchor; the hermetic seal of the vessel is int...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def diy_organic_homunculus_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (diy_organic_homunculus_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def diy_organic_homunculus_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (diy_organic_homunculus_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem diy_organic_homunculus_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
